read_only_health.response_bodies: HTTP 200; bodies saved only on auditor workstation under a temp directory (not repo). Do not commit response files.

notes: All required destructive confirmations and write flags match harness expectations for production destructive template.
Irreversible side-effect flags are false — real PSP, dispense, machine commands, external notifications remain blocked.
If ADMIN_TOKEN is set, E2E_ORGANIZATION_ID is still required unless org id is in reused test-data.json.
Email/password path requires ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD, and E2E_ORGANIZATION_ID per 01_web_admin_setup.sh.
E2E_* naming fields present in .env.production.destructive.local for org/site/product/slot.
Backend and ops use DATABASE_URL (see internal/config/deployment_env.go). E2E runners create state via REST/gRPC, not direct DSN in .env.
E2E_ALLOW_DIRECT_DB_WRITE / E2E_DIRECT_DB_WRITE_CONFIRMATION are not referenced by current tests/e2e harness — treat as future/operator-only if adding psql seed scripts.

missing: E2E_ACTIVATION_CODE or secrets from prior run
GRPC_PROTO_ROOT (empty in local file — should be set to repo proto root when running from checkout)
notes: Proto sources live under repo path proto/avf/machine/v1/*.proto.
Harness e2e_grpc.sh uses grpcurl -plaintext only; production GRPC_ADDR on :443 typically implies TLS — likely needs harness or grpcurl flag work before full prod gRPC E2E.
GRPC_USE_REFLECTION=false — protos must be imported from GRPC_PROTO_ROOT.
Runbook docs/runbooks/production-2-vps.md lists MQTT domain mqtt.ldtv.dev; broker ACLs/credentials are operator-provided.
Do not publish/subscribe in audit; scenarios under tests/e2e/scenarios/3*_mqtt_*.sh document expected flows.
Optional TLS client certs (MQTT_CA_CERT, MQTT_CLIENT_CERT, MQTT_CLIENT_KEY) not set — may be required for mTLS deployments.
E2E_ALLOW_REAL_PAYMENT=false — live PSP capture must remain off.

Phase 8 scenario 42_e2e_qr_payment_success_mock.sh signs webhooks using COMMERCE_PAYMENT_WEBHOOK_SECRET or legacy aliases from process env — operator must inject matching server secret for valid HMAC tests against prod.
Production PAYMENT_ENV is live per config rules; sandbox/mock path still depends on provider configuration and test data — classify further after admin + machine setup.

command_surface_notes: MachineCommandService defines command_type string + payload Struct (proto/avf/machine/v1/command.proto) — specific dangerous types are policy/content-dependent.
Treat dispense, reboot, unlock, door, cashbox access, firmware push, and similar as high-risk unless E2E_ALLOW_REAL_MACHINE_COMMANDS=true and E2E_ALLOW_REAL_DISPENSE=true.
notes: Synthetic MQTT command ACK tests may still run with broker credentials without real hardware if scenarios use noop/safe topics — subject to MQTT blockers above.
No tests/e2e/fixtures/ media file in repo yet; propose tests/e2e/fixtures/test-product-image.png for future upload scenarios.
E2E_MEDIA_TEST_FILE / E2E_ALLOW_OBJECT_STORAGE_WRITE not set in destructive env.

missing_required_inputs: E2E_ORGANIZATION_ID when using password login or when ADMIN_TOKEN lacks org context in test-data
MACHINE_ID and (MACHINE_TOKEN or E2E_ACTIVATION_CODE) for machine/gRPC/MQTT-heavy phases
MQTT_HOST (+ likely MQTT_USERNAME/MQTT_PASSWORD) for MQTT phases
GRPC_PROTO_ROOT when running grpcurl with GRPC_USE_REFLECTION=false
Likely TLS/grpcurl compatibility for api.ldtv.dev:443 beyond current -plaintext harness
operator_actions: Copy updated tests/e2e/.env.production.destructive.example into tests/e2e/.env.production.destructive.local and merge your secrets (never commit .local).
Set MQTT_HOST (e.g. mqtt.ldtv.dev per runbook) and broker credentials from ops.
Set E2E_ORGANIZATION_ID to the target org UUID for admin login, or provide ADMIN_TOKEN plus org in reused test-data.json.
Provide MACHINE_TOKEN via prior run secrets.private.json reuse, or MACHINE_ID + E2E_ACTIVATION_CODE for claim flows.
Set GRPC_PROTO_ROOT to the absolute or repo-relative proto directory (e.g. proto) from your checkout.
If exercising signed payment webhooks, export COMMERCE_PAYMENT_WEBHOOK_SECRET (or HMAC alias) matching server config without committing it.
Re-run this audit after filling: use static flow review command in production-e2e-missing-inputs.md
